title: Separate classical structural formulas from project scoring heuristics

positions.summary: Compute eight-palace, Najia, six-relative, six-spirit, void, Shi/Ying, and moving-line facts with classical provenance.
Apply bounded project-authored strength, use-deity, and timing candidate heuristics only when explicitly requested.

default_policy.rationale: Deterministic structural facts remain valid without opting into unreviewed judgment heuristics.

user_disclosure: Classical structural calculations and project-authored judgment scores are separate layers; scores are experimental, not classical facts.
